Package com.irurueta.geometry.io

Class MeshWriter.Listeners

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.geometry.io.MeshWriter.Listeners
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    LoaderListener, LoaderListenerBinary, LoaderListenerOBJ, MaterialLoaderListener
    Enclosing class:
    MeshWriter
    private class MeshWriter.Listeners
extends Object
implements LoaderListener, LoaderListenerOBJ, LoaderListenerBinary, MaterialLoaderListener
    Internal class implementing listeners for different specific loaders.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private MeshWriter writer
      Reference to mesh writer.

      Constructor Description
      Listeners​(MeshWriter writer)

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void onLoadEnd​(Loader loader)
      Method called when the loader ends processing a file.
      void onLoadEnd​(MaterialLoader loader)
      Called when material loader finishes processing materials.
      void onLoadProgressChange​(Loader loader, float progress)
      Method called when loading progress changes enough to be notified.
      void onLoadStart​(Loader loader)
      Method called when the loader starts processing a file.
      void onLoadStart​(MaterialLoader loader)
      Called when material loader starts processing materials.
      MaterialLoaderOBJ onMaterialLoaderRequested​(LoaderOBJ loader, String path)
      Called when an OBJ loader requires a material loader to load the associated material (MTL) file.
      boolean onTextureDataAvailable​(LoaderBinary loader, File textureFile, int textureId, int textureImageWidth, int textureImageHeight)
      Called when texture data is available to be retrieved.
      File onTextureReceived​(LoaderBinary loader, int textureId, int textureImageWidth, int textureImageHeight)
      Called when a texture has been found.
      boolean onValidateTexture​(MaterialLoader loader, Texture texture)
      Called when a texture assigned to a material must be validated to ensure that texture is valid.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • onLoadStart

        public void onLoadStart​(Loader loader)
        Method called when the loader starts processing a file.
        Specified by:
        onLoadStart in interface LoaderListener
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.

      • onLoadEnd

        public void onLoadEnd​(Loader loader)
        Method called when the loader ends processing a file.
        Specified by:
        onLoadEnd in interface LoaderListener
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.

      • onLoadProgressChange

        public void onLoadProgressChange​(Loader loader,
                                 float progress)
        Method called when loading progress changes enough to be notified.
        Specified by:
        onLoadProgressChange in interface LoaderListener
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.
        progress - progress amount as a value between 0.0 and 1.0.

      • onMaterialLoaderRequested

        public MaterialLoaderOBJ onMaterialLoaderRequested​(LoaderOBJ loader,
                                                   String path)
        Called when an OBJ loader requires a material loader to load the associated material (MTL) file.
        Specified by:
        onMaterialLoaderRequested in interface LoaderListenerOBJ
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.
        path - path where MTL file should be found. It's up to the final implementation to determine where the file will be finally found.
        Returns:
        an instance of a material loader.

      • onTextureReceived

        public File onTextureReceived​(LoaderBinary loader,
                              int textureId,
                              int textureImageWidth,
                              int textureImageHeight)
        Called when a texture has been found.
        Specified by:
        onTextureReceived in interface LoaderListenerBinary
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.
        textureId - id assigned to the texture that has been found.
        textureImageWidth - width of texture image that has been found.
        textureImageHeight - height of texture image that has been found.
        Returns:
        File where texture data will be copied to.

      • onTextureDataAvailable

        public boolean onTextureDataAvailable​(LoaderBinary loader,
                                      File textureFile,
                                      int textureId,
                                      int textureImageWidth,
                                      int textureImageHeight)
        Called when texture data is available to be retrieved.
        Specified by:
        onTextureDataAvailable in interface LoaderListenerBinary
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.
        textureFile - reference to a File where texture data has been temporarily copied.
        textureId - id assigned to the texture.
        textureImageWidth - width of texture image.
        textureImageHeight - height of texture image.
        Returns:
        converted image transcoded into JPG format or resized if needed, or input textureFile if no changes are needed.
        See Also:
        LoaderListenerBinary.onTextureReceived(LoaderBinary, int, int, int)

      • onLoadStart

        public void onLoadStart​(MaterialLoader loader)
        Called when material loader starts processing materials.
        Specified by:
        onLoadStart in interface MaterialLoaderListener
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.

      • onLoadEnd

        public void onLoadEnd​(MaterialLoader loader)
        Called when material loader finishes processing materials.
        Specified by:
        onLoadEnd in interface MaterialLoaderListener
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.

      • onValidateTexture

        public boolean onValidateTexture​(MaterialLoader loader,
                                 Texture texture)
        Called when a texture assigned to a material must be validated to ensure that texture is valid.
        Specified by:
        onValidateTexture in interface MaterialLoaderListener
        Parameters:
        loader - reference to loader.
        texture - texture reference to be validated.
        Returns:
        true if texture is valid, false otherwise.
